zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Lascelles於1262年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Richard  Lascelles Jackson42歲，母親Elizabeth De La River22歲。他和Anne Skipwith至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1297年在他的家鄉享年35歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lascelles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one of the large number of places in northern France called Celle, Celles, Lacelle, Leschelle, or Lachelle, all from French celle ‘hermitage’, and at different times occurring both with and without the plural -s.
Variant of   Lacelle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Laswell
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Lascelles  . This surname is also found as   Lacefield  .

variants.name: Lacelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Aurele, Benoit, Cecile, Marcel, Marie Paule.
Altered form of French Laselle: habitational name from La Selle, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Laselle is very rare in France, found in Marne. Compare Lascelles .

In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Lacelle in Corrèze or numerous minor places called La Celle, all named for a monastic cell or hermitage in their vicinity, from French celle ‘hermitage’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Lascelles was born in 1262, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard  Lascelles Jackson, was 42 and his mother, Elizabeth De La River, was 22. He had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Anne Skipwith. He died in 1297, in his hometown, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Lascelles est né en 1262, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard  Lascelles Jackson, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth De La River, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Anne Skipwith. Il est décédé en 1297, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.Castle Howard, North Yorkshire, England,: Castle Howard, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John de Lascelles 1262 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard  Lascelles Jackson 42 und seine Mutter Elizabeth De La River 22. Er hatte mit Anne Skipwith mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1297 im Alter von 35 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Anne Skipwith. Morì nel 1297, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John de Lascelles(이)가 1262년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard  Lascelles Jackson(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth De La River(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Anne Skipwith(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년 그의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.
